qa_pairs.question: What is the purpose of the fastahack module?
qa_pairs.answer: The fastahack module provides utilities for indexing and extracting sequences from FASTA files.

qa_pairs.question: What version of fastahack is available?
qa_pairs.answer: fastahack version 1.0.0 is available.

qa_pairs.question: Where can I find the homepage for fastahack?
qa_pairs.answer: The homepage for fastahack is located at https://github.com/ekg/fastahack.

qa_pairs.question: What is FastANI designed to do?
qa_pairs.answer: FastANI is designed for the fast, alignment-free computation of whole-genome Average Nucleotide Identity (ANI).

qa_pairs.question: How is Average Nucleotide Identity (ANI) defined when using FastANI?
qa_pairs.answer: ANI is defined as the mean nucleotide identity of orthologous gene pairs shared between two microbial genomes.

qa_pairs.question: What types of genome assemblies does FastANI support for pairwise comparison?
qa_pairs.answer: FastANI supports the pairwise comparison of both complete and draft genome assemblies.

qa_pairs.question: What version of FastANI is available?
qa_pairs.answer: FastANI version 1.32 is available.

qa_pairs.question: What is the web address for FastANI?
qa_pairs.answer: The web address for FastANI is https://github.com/ParBLiSS/FastANI.

qa_pairs.question: What is FastQC?
qa_pairs.answer: FastQC is a quality control application for high-throughput sequence data.

qa_pairs.question: What functionality does FastQC provide for sequence data?
qa_pairs.answer: FastQC can read sequence data in various formats and offer an interactive application to review quality control check results or generate an HTML-based report for pipeline integration.

qa_pairs.question: What versions of FastQC are available?
qa_pairs.answer: FastQC is available in versions 0.11.9 and 0.12.0.

qa_pairs.question: What is the category of the FastQC module?
qa_pairs.answer: FastQC is a bio type module.

qa_pairs.question: What is the homepage URL for FastQC?
qa_pairs.answer: The homepage URL for FastQC is https://www.bioinformatics.babraham.ac.uk/projects/fastqc/.

qa_pairs.question: How does fastsimcoal differ from simcoal2?
qa_pairs.answer: Fastsimcoal preserves all the simulation flexibility of simcoal2 but is implemented under a faster continuous-time sequential Markovian coalescent approximation.

qa_pairs.question: What can fastsimcoal efficiently generate?
qa_pairs.answer: Fastsimcoal can efficiently generate genetic diversity for different types of markers across large genomic regions for both present and ancient samples.

qa_pairs.question: Does fastsimcoal include a parameter sampler?
qa_pairs.answer: Yes, fastsimcoal includes a parameter sampler that allows its integration into Bayesian or likelihood parameter estimation procedures.

qa_pairs.question: What types of evolutionary scenarios can fastsimcoal handle?
qa_pairs.answer: Fastsimcoal can handle complex evolutionary scenarios, including an arbitrary migration matrix between samples, historical events for population resize, fusion, fission, admixture, and changes in migration matrix or population growth rates.

qa_pairs.question: Can fastsimcoal specify independent sampling times for each sample?
qa_pairs.answer: Yes, the time of sampling can be specified independently for each sample, allowing for serial sampling in the same or different populations.

qa_pairs.question: What versions of fastsimcoal2 are available?
qa_pairs.answer: Fastsimcoal2 versions 2.6.0.3 and 2.7.0.9 are available.

qa_pairs.question: What type of module is fastsimcoal2?
qa_pairs.answer: Fastsimcoal2 is a bio type module.

qa_pairs.question: What is the web address for fastsimcoal2?
qa_pairs.answer: The web address for fastsimcoal2 is http://cmpg.unibe.ch/software/fastsimcoal2/.

qa_pairs.question: What is the function of FastTree?
qa_pairs.answer: FastTree infers approximately-maximum-likelihood phylogenetic trees from alignments of nucleotide or protein sequences.

qa_pairs.question: What is the capacity of FastTree regarding sequence alignments?
qa_pairs.answer: FastTree can handle alignments with up to a million sequences within a reasonable amount of time and memory.

qa_pairs.question: What version of FastTree is available?
qa_pairs.answer: FastTree version 2.1.11 is available.

qa_pairs.question: What type of module is FastTree?
qa_pairs.answer: FastTree is a bio type module.

qa_pairs.question: Is there any documentation available for FastTree?
qa_pairs.answer: Yes, documentation for FastTree is available.

qa_pairs.question: What is the homepage for the FastTree module?
qa_pairs.answer: The homepage for the FastTree module is http://www.microbesonline.org/fasttree/.

qa_pairs.question: What is fasttree-double?
qa_pairs.answer: Fasttree-double is a version of FastTree that infers approximately-maximum-likelihood phylogenetic trees from alignments of nucleotide or protein sequences.

qa_pairs.question: How many sequences can fasttree-double handle?
qa_pairs.answer: Fasttree-double can handle alignments with up to a million sequences in a reasonable amount of time and memory.

qa_pairs.question: What version of fasttree-double is provided?
qa_pairs.answer: Fasttree-double version 2.1.11 is provided.

qa_pairs.question: Where can I find the documentation for fasttree-double?
qa_pairs.answer: Documentation for fasttree-double is available.

qa_pairs.question: What is the homepage for fasttree-double?
qa_pairs.answer: The homepage for fasttree-double is http://www.microbesonline.org/fasttree/.

qa_pairs.question: What is fermi-lite?
qa_pairs.answer: Fermi-lite is a standalone C library designed for assembling Illumina short reads in small regions.

qa_pairs.question: What version of fermi-lite is available?
qa_pairs.answer: Fermi-lite version 20190320 is available.

qa_pairs.question: What is the URL for the fermi-lite project?
qa_pairs.answer: The URL for the fermi-lite project is https://github.com/lh3/fermi-lite.
